The '''Model Com C-38''' was a command center model designed by [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]], that was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was commonly used as a base of operations which Imperial officers and staff used to direct all base and ground force operations on a planet, unless more advanced structures were available.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
